name: Install Shell
description: Install bash and zsh shells, add plugins and themes, and set up robust configuration files.

branch.description:
Branch or tag of the ohmyzsh/ohmyzsh repository to clone.
Also recorded as `oh-my-zsh.branch` in the git config so `omz update` works correctly.

configure_zshrc.description:
Write (or replace) a guarded oh-my-zsh configuration block between `# BEGIN install-ohmyzsh` and `# END install-ohmyzsh` markers in `/etc/zsh/zshrc`, making the configuration available to every user on the system.
Also appends a `.profile` sourcing snippet to `/etc/zsh/zprofile` so that zsh login shells inherit `PATH` and other environment variables configured there.

font_dir.description: Path to the directory where fonts will be downloaded.

install_dir.description:
Path to the Oh My Zsh installation directory.
This is the directory where Oh My Zsh will be installed.
It corresponds to the [`ZSH`](https://github.com/ohmyzsh/ohmyzsh/wiki/Settings#zsh)
configuration variable in Oh My Zsh.

install_fonts.description: Download and install the MesloLGS Nerd Font files to `font_dir` and refresh the font cache.

logfile.description: Log all output (stdout + stderr) to this file in addition to console.

plugins.description:
Comma-separated list of Oh My Zsh custom plugins to install, each as a `owner/repo` GitHub slug.
The repository is cloned into `<zsh_custom_dir>/plugins/<repo>`.
Set to an empty string to install no custom plugins.

set_default_shell_for.description:
Comma-separated list of usernames whose default login shell should be changed to zsh via `chsh`.
Skips silently if zsh or chsh is not found, or if the default shell is already zsh.

theme.description:
Oh My Zsh custom theme to install, as a `owner/repo` GitHub slug.
The repository is cloned into `<zsh_custom_dir>/themes/<repo>`.
The default is the [Powerlevel10k](https://github.com/romkatv/powerlevel10k) theme. Set to an empty string to install no custom theme.

zsh_custom_dir.description:
Path to the Oh My Zsh custom directory.
This corresponds to the [`ZSH_CUSTOM`](https://github.com/ohmyzsh/ohmyzsh/wiki/Settings#zsh_custom)
configuration variable in Oh My Zsh.
Defaults to `<install_dir>/custom`.
